/CAL: TO SET JURY TRIAL AND DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY CONDITIONS OF RELEASE//MO GRTD/EMMOD: DEFENDANT MAY GO TO 1200 FLORIDA STREET IN SAN FRANCISCO AT ST, PETER'S CHURCH ON 07-03-22 AT 9:30AM UNTIL 4:30PM/CONTD: TO SET TRIAL AND RECEIPT OF SDT RECORDS/DOPU:ACM/
/CAL: DA MOTION TO DETAIN/ARG&SUB/X: MOTION TO DENIED IS DENIED/X: CONDITIONS OF RELEASE REMAIN THE SAME AS STATED ON 3-9-22/X: FUTURE DATES ARE CONFIRMED/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT, DA'S NOTICE OF MOTION & MOTION TO DETAIN/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR: 05-23-22/CONTD:PHC IN DEPT, 23 & JURY TRIAL IN DEPT, 22 & DA'S MOTION TO DETAIN IN DEPT, 13/DOP/

/CAL: CONT PRELIM HEARING/HTA1:1,2/X: THE COURT FINDS THE ALLEGATION OF GREAT BODILY INJURY PURSUANTTO PC SECTION 1192,7(C)(8) LISTED IN THE COMPLAINT AS TRUE,/X: THE PEOPLE'SREQUEST FOR THE DEFENDANT TO BE REMANDED INTO CUSTODY IS ARGUED AND DENIED,/DEF: TO CONTINUE ON ACM STATUS AND COMPLY WITHTHE CURRENT ELECTRONIC MONITORING ORDER WITH THE FOLLOWING EXCEPTION AND MODIFICATION/EMMOD: HOME DETENTION ORDER IS MODIFIED TO ALLOW THE DEFENDANT TO ATTEND WORK-EMPLOYMENT/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO APD AND PARTICIPATE IN OUT-PATIENT TREATMENT PROGRAMN, ANGER MANAGEMENT/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENTIN DEPT 22 ON 03-24-22/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:PEOPLE'S REQUEST TO ORALLY AMEND COMPLAINT TO ADD ENHANCEMENT PURSUANT PC 12022,7, AS TO COUNTS #1 & #2 - GRANTED/WITEXCL:DEFENSE/WIT SWORN DA:CARLOS RIVERA ORELLANA/X:VICTIM IS BEING ASSISTED BYA CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER WHO HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT, AND THAT ALL PROVISIONS OF GOVERNMENT CODE 68561 HAVE BEEN SATISFIED/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT #1: USB (SURVEILLANCE VIDEO FROM MISSION ORGANIC); EXHIBIT#2: USB (SURVEILLANCE VIDEO FROM MISSION ORGANIC); EXHIBIT #3: FIVE(5) COLORED PHOTOS OF VICTIM/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE RETURNED TO THE  OFFERING PARTY,/CONTD: 03-10-22 AT 9AM FOR CONTINUANCE OF PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:DOP ZOOM OK/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 02-09-22/X: THE60TH CALENDAR DAY IS 03-28-22,/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS AND SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 1HR/SA1: CARLOS RIVERA-ORELLANA/SA2: 5258 MISSION ST IN SF/SAORD3/SAORD/
/CAL:JURY TRIAL, LD 05-23-22/DAWT/X:GTW ENTERED ON 05-03-22/CONTD:TO SETJURY TRIAL/DOPC/
/CAL: STATUS OF SDT RECORDS/DAWT/X: SDT RECORDS RELEASE TO DA/X: FUTURE DATE IS CONFIRMED/
